title: Settings
settingsModeDesc: Basic mode shows daily workflow settings. Advanced mode includes account, key, and automation controls.
defaultModelDesc: Choose the default model for new conversations. Models are provided via OpenRouter.
modelAccessDesc: Choose how to connect to AI models.
providerModeDesc: Connect multiple providers and select which one to use. Switch anytime without disconnecting.
openyakAccountDesc: Free models included with 1M tokens/week. Resets every Friday at 12:00 UTC. Buy credits for premium models.
apiKeyDesc: Enter your OpenRouter API key for direct access. Get one at
chatgptSubscriptionDesc: Sign in with your ChatGPT Plus/Pro/Team subscription to access OpenAI models at no extra API cost.
chatgptPasteInstruction: After logging in, copy the full URL from your browser and paste it here:
chatgptManualCallbackFailed: Failed to process URL. It may have expired — try signing in again.
defaultAgentDesc: Choose the default agent mode for new conversations.
thinkingModeDesc: When enabled, the AI shows its reasoning process for better answers.
workspaceDirectoryDesc: Restrict the assistant to only read and modify files within this directory. Leave empty for unrestricted access.
autoApproveDesc: Allow the assistant to perform actions without asking for permission each time.
fileChangesDesc: Create and edit files without asking
agentDesc_build: Full-featured AI assistant with all tools
remoteDesc: Control OpenYak from your phone. Tasks execute on this computer and results stream back.
remotePermissionDesc: How to handle tool approvals from remote tasks
remoteInstructions: Enable remote access to control OpenYak from your phone:
remoteStep1: Toggle the switch above to enable
remoteStep2: Scan the QR code with your phone camera
remoteStep3: Or open the tunnel URL in your phone browser
aboutDesc: Your local AI assistant — private, powerful, personal.
